pattern.styleContract: Bright and exacting with edge-check proof, real squeegee work evidence, yellow checklist/action accents, and a checklist hero panel as the signature move.

tagline: Glass so clear the sunshine gets cocky.

hero.title: ClearPane window cleaning hero image
hero.alt: A professional window cleaner using a squeegee on large residential windows in bright daylight.

contact.serviceArea: Homes, storefronts, and small offices across the east side, lake blocks, and nearby suburbs

copy.eyebrow: Local window cleaning without the streak circus
copy.heroText: ClearPane handles interior glass, exterior panes, screens, tracks, and storefront touch-ups with tidy crews, careful edges, and squeegee lines that know when to quit.
copy.introTitle: Clean glass changes the whole room.
copy.introText: We bring the water-fed poles, detail towels, screen brushes, and the sort of patience that makes fingerprints reconsider their life choices.
copy.quoteText: Send a window count, a few photos, and whether you need inside, outside, or both. We will reply with a simple estimate and the next open shine day.

services.title: Exterior panes
services.text: Ground-level and reachable exterior glass cleaned with pro tools, clean edges, and careful rinse work.

services.title: Interior glass
services.text: Fingerprints, pet nose art, and mystery smudges removed without turning your floors into a splash zone.

services.title: Screens and tracks
services.text: Screens brushed, sills wiped, and tracks cleared so the whole window feels finished instead of half-done.

process.title: Count the windows
process.text: Send a quick count, note tricky spots, and include photos of tall or tucked-away glass.

process.title: Choose the scope
process.text: Pick exterior only, inside and out, screens, tracks, or a storefront refresh.

process.title: Enjoy the view
process.text: We protect floors, wipe edges, check the shine from multiple angles, and leave the light doing its thing.

proof.label: final towel pass on every visit

notes: Works: a checklist hero panel. gives the page a memorable shape.
Proof: visible checklist-triggering service work. anchors the niche in the first viewport.
Action: Get a shine quote is the main conversion path.

brandBrief.accentBehavior: sun stays reserved for Get a shine quote, active proof cues, and key booking moments.
brandBrief.avoidLookingLike: Avoid a generic checklist-urgency recolor; do not repeat stock hero framing, copied card rhythm, or vague local-service claims.

serviceDetails.whatToSend: Send a window count, a few photos, and whether you need inside, outside, or both. We will reply with a simple estimate and the next open shine day.
serviceDetails.prepNote: Send a quick count, note tricky spots, and include photos of tall or tucked-away glass.
serviceDetails.serviceRhythm: quote first for Homes, storefronts, and small offices across the east side, lake blocks, and nearby suburbs.
serviceDetails.objectionAnswer: Scope, access, timing, and fit are confirmed before booking so the next step is clear and low-pressure.
